conflicting_signals: Buying exhaustion is the strongest short-term flow read (score 1.14) and bearish initiation confirmed at 2361.74, showing active seller response into highs.
15m footprint pressure is soft: window delta is -8362.62 and OFI is strongly negative (ofi_norm -0.81), so buyers are not cleanly owning the test of resistance.
Price is pinned at the top of a very tight bracket, with stacked sell liquidity at 2359.01-2359.56 and another sell stack at 2360.87-2360.89 directly overhead.
15m.opportunity: A clean 15m acceptance above 2359.25 would resolve the compression higher and opens a quick rotation toward 2363.70, then 2366.31.
15m.risk: Because price is already testing the top of the range in elevated VPIN, a failed breakout can flush back through 2353.89 and quickly expose 2348.50.
supporting_signals: Bullish absorption printed at 2358.94 and 2354.11, while selling exhaustion peaked at 2349.57, showing dip buyers are defending the lower half of the bracket.
Support at 2353.89 is the strongest local level, with 5-way confluence from the order book, PVS POC/VAL, and RVWAP -1/-2 bands.
Hidden bullish divergence, bullish whale flow (+$2.21M net delta), and a bull EMA regime keep the short-term downside from fully taking control.

conflicting_signals: Daily buying exhaustion is very strong (score 11.52), with notable events at 2356.15, 2365.25, and 2373.00, showing overhead supply on pushes higher.
Price is extended: daily RVWAP z-score is 1.55, it is near the upper RVWAP expansion zone (2379.70), and only about 0.24 ATR below the 2385.78 swing-high breakout area.
Absorption is slightly net negative/neutral on the day, so continuation is not being driven by clean aggressive follow-through buying.
1d.opportunity: As long as the 2348.50-2352.84 support cluster holds, daily acceptance above 2366.31 keeps trend continuation open toward 2379.70-2385.78.
1d.risk: If price loses the 2348.50-2352.84 support cluster, the daily exhaustion profile can unwind into a deeper retrace toward 2332.64 and potentially the 2260.00 daily POC.
supporting_signals: The higher-timeframe regime is still bullish: price is 22.01% above the daily EMA100 and about 223.61 points above the 7-day futures AVWAP.
Participation remains constructive with bullish daily CVD, bullish whale flow (+$607.54M net delta), strong selling exhaustion (10.21), and net bullish divergence (5.20).
The market is still holding above broader daily value, with the active support cluster concentrated between 2348.50 and 2352.84.

conflicting_signals: Buying exhaustion remains strong on 4h (score 3.81), signaling seller response on pushes into the 2356-2373 zone.
A heavy resistance stack sits at 2359.48, with the next cap at 2366.31; order-book liquidity also shows a nearby ask wall at 2366.64.
The market is still auctioning inside 4h value, and the footprint shows both stacked buys and stacked sells, so upside acceptance is not confirmed yet.
4h.opportunity: If buyers can accept above 2359.48, the 4h structure can continue higher toward 2366.31 and then 2385.78 in line with the broader bull trend.
4h.risk: Repeated rejection from 2359.48/2366.31 can turn this into a value rejection back toward 2345.36 and, if that fails, the deeper 2330.48 bid wall.
supporting_signals: The 4h trend regime is bullish, with price still 14.3% above the 4h EMA100 and well above the 7-day AVWAP anchor.
Bullish flow is led by selling exhaustion (3.64), hidden bullish divergence (2.74), bullish CVD, and bullish whale positioning.
Local structure is still supported by 2345.36, with a deeper bid wall and structural support at 2330.48 keeping the higher-low framework intact.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: The daily backdrop remains bullish but increasingly extended into overhead supply, the 4h is the active bullish setup compressing just under 2359.48/2366.31 resistance, and the 15m is the trigger layer currently stuck in a conflicted 2353.89-2359.25 box. In practice, this is a higher-timeframe uptrend waiting on short-term acceptance above resistance for continuation; otherwise, the immediate risk is a rejection back into value before the larger bull trend tries again.
